item.description:
# Fastband Core 0.1.1
This MVP update restores compatibility with AIM installations that return canonical numeric repository identifiers and introduces Fastband Core's signed, user-controlled update lifecycle.
- AIM status, claim, and launch authorization now accept valid canonical repository identifiers. - **Check for Updates…** is available from the Fastband Core menu. - Fastband Core checks the signed update feed daily while leaving download and installation under user control. - The packaged app includes Sparkle 2.9.4 and verifies the pinned Fastband release identity throughout installation.
